type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination
Commentaire sur le recyclage
Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of ethylene glycol release was up from the previous year due to to an increase of numbers of aircrraft requiring de-icing and higher frequency of de-icing caused by inclement weather.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Process for recycling contaminated glycol after the de-icing process is not available

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase of release is due to the increase of number of aircaft who required de-icing and an icreased of frequency because of more inclement weather.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination
Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: De-icing operation increased due to weather and also due to an increase of aircraft to de-ice.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: 90 % of the glycol is recovered.  The recovered glycol is treated at the Wing Sewage Plant.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A less severe winter reduced the aircraft de-icing requirements.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: 90 % of the glycol is recovered.  The recovered glycol is treated at the Wing Sewage Plant.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Glycol is disposed off by treatment in the sewage plant.  It is estimated that, due to adhesion to aircraft surfaces and overspray, less than 10% of the glycol sprayed was not recovered and treated

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
